confirmedFindingsFixed.summary: OpenAI adapter accepted JSON content without a drafts array as a successful empty parse.
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Adapter now throws an adapter-failed ParsingError for missing drafts arrays and has a regression test.

confirmedFindingsFixed.summary: Non-empty parser category text was trimmed instead of being preserved as-is.
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Parser canonicalization and item creation now preserve non-empty category strings exactly while still defaulting blank categories.

confirmedFindingsFixed.summary: Parser confidence was exposed on drafts but not persisted with created ledger items.
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Added nullable ledger item confidence plumbing through domain/schema/mappers/Postgres/item creation; ledger UI does not render it.

acceptedFindings.summary: OpenAI adapter endpoint is injectable for tests/dev; future Settings/import code should not expose arbitrary endpoint configuration without allowlisting.
acceptedFindings.rationale: Current slice has no UI or user-configured endpoint surface.

acceptedFindings.summary: No live OpenAI/provider integration was exercised.
acceptedFindings.rationale: This slice owns the deterministic adapter boundary and fake-fetch tests; live provider validation belongs to later integration/manual checks once settings/import flows exist.
